title: Build Admin Panel and Integrate TipTap Editor
description: Create the /admin section with CRUD interfaces for Products, Orders, and Blog. Integrate TipTap editor for blog content.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD interfaces for Products, Orders, and Blog posts are functional
TipTap editor supports text formatting, images, and YouTube embeds
Images are uploaded directly to MinIO using presigned URLs
Admin routes are protected and only accessible to users with the 'admin' role
